SavedChart.title: Saved Chart
SavedChart.description: A user's saved astrology chart data.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this chart.

name.description: The name given to the chart.

tags.description: A list of tags for categorization.

SavedReport.title: Saved Report
SavedReport.description: An AI generated report saved by the user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the report.

userName.description: The name of the individual the report belongs to.

reportText.description: The full text content of the report.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of saved AI astrology and medical reports.
